overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a tribal waterfront settlement. The character walks along wooden docks extending over calm water, passing NPC villagers and admiring scenic mountain backdrops and towering wooden settlement structures under bright sunlight.

NPC villager carrying wooden crate passes close to camera on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden dock planks, passing carved pillars and wooden structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a partially covered wooden dock, transitioning from shade to sunlight. Carved wooden pillars line the right side while tribal stone buildings stand to the left. An NPC villager carrying a crate passes by on the right, and distant mountain peaks are visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pier extending over water with mountain views

events.description: moves from enclosed dock area onto open pier with full sky visibility
character reaches end of pier, stops, and begins turning around

agents.ego_description: walking to the end of the wooden pier, pausing to observe the mountain scenery, then turning around

safety netting made of thick rope between wooden posts
safety netting made of thick rope between wooden posts

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open wooden pier extending over calm water, with rope netting railings on both sides. The space is empty of people, offering an unobstructed view of distant mountain cliffs. The character walks to the pier's end, pauses to observe the scenery, then turns to head back.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier return path with view of settlement towers

events.description: character completes turn and begins walking back toward the settlement
camera pans upward to reveal tall tribal tower structures against the sky

agents.ego_description: walking back along the pier while looking up at the tall settlement towers and surrounding architecture

entered.detail: massive wooden tower structure with multiple levels and scaffolding
cluster of wooden and stone buildings with red roofs
suspension bridge connecting structures over the water
red and yellow hanging fabric decorations between buildings
decorative wooden entrance structure with tribal patterns

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back toward the settlement, revealing a dramatic view of tall tribal towers and wooden structures built into the mountainside. The camera pans upward to showcase the impressive vertical architecture, rope bridges, and colorful banners decorating the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal waterfront settlement street with market stalls

events.description: enters more populated settlement area with market stalls and NPCs
passes under wooden archway into slightly shaded corridor section

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement waterfront, passing villagers and market stalls

notable_agents.action: villager standing near building entrance observing the surroundings

entered.detail: multi-story stone structure with wooden balconies and red roof
wooden rowboat moored alongside the dock
wooden table with goods and fabric canopy
external staircase leading to upper building level
vertical wooden posts supporting dock structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the populated waterfront settlement, passing tribal stone buildings with red roofs, colorful hanging banners, and wooden market stalls. NPC villagers are scattered along the path, and small boats are moored alongside the wooden dock. The character passes under a carved wooden archway into a slightly shaded corridor section.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded dock out toward a scenic waterfront vista before returning into the heart of a bustling tribal settlement. It begins with the character walking along a partially covered wooden dock, transitioning from the shade of carved pillars and stone buildings into bright sunlight as an NPC villager passes by. As the path opens, the camera follows the character onto an empty pier extending over calm water, pausing at the edge to take in the distant mountain cliffs before turning back toward the village. The scene then shifts to a dramatic upward pan, revealing towering wooden architecture, rope bridges, and colorful banners built into the mountainside. Finally, the camera moves back through the populated settlement, passing red-roofed buildings and moored boats before gliding under a carved wooden archway into a shaded corridor.
